lingerSeconds.Name: lingerSeconds
lingerSeconds.Description: How long in seconds to keep the widget visible after a prompt completes or expires.

startedSound.Name: startedSound
startedSound.Description: Sound to play when prompt starts

successSound.Name: successSound
successSound.Description: Sound to play when prompt completes

failSound.Name: failSound
failSound.Description: Sound to play when prompt expires

GoogleFonts.description: Additional google fonts to load to use in CSS Variables. Comma separated.
